content_body:
Twisted Tomato has delicious pizza that is homemade every single day, using the freshest cheeses, vegetables, meats, and garden herbs with multiple different topping options, as well as an extensive craft beer and wine list. Their menu brings authentic, quality dining to the heart of the Copper Basin - not to mention relaxing and enjoying the riverside views of the beautiful Toccoa River while you dine!

Visit their McCaysville or Blue Ridge location on your vacation!
title: Twisted Tomato
